description_long: This oven features a rectangular, boxy form with a metallic, matte gray exterior. The front face is open, revealing a spacious interior with a metal rack and two prominent, horizontally mounted cylindrical handles. The control panel is located on the right side of the front, equipped with two large, round black knobs and two small circular indicator lights or buttons. The sides and back are plain, with no visible openings, windows, or branding. The oven's surface appears robust and industrial, suitable for heavy-duty or commercial use, and the overall design is utilitarian with minimal decorative elements.
description: A robust, metallic oven with a matte gray finish, open front, dual handles, and a simple control panel with two knobs and indicator lights.
description_view_0: The front view shows the open oven cavity, two horizontal handles, a metal rack, and the control panel with knobs and buttons on the right.
description_view_1: The left side view displays a plain, solid metallic surface with the ends of the control knobs and handles slightly visible.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals a featureless, flat metallic back with no visible openings or details.
description_view_3: The right side view shows a plain metallic surface with the end of one handle protruding outward.
attribute_control_panel_design: The control panel is located on the right front side and features two large, round black knobs arranged vertically, with two small circular indicator lights or buttons positioned above and between the knobs. The panel is simple, with no visible labels, displays, or decorative elements.
attribute_door_handle_type: The oven has two horizontally mounted, cylindrical handles protruding from the lower front edge. They appear to be made of dark-colored metal or plastic and are designed for a firm grip, with a utilitarian, functional style.
